title: Migration Eval Trial Result
description: Schema for per-trial result.json files emitted by the migration eval framework. See docs/migration_eval/README.md and docs/PRD.md for context.

success.description: True iff the trial passed the reported oracle tier.

failure_class.description: PRD M6 four-way failure discrimination; null when success=true.

oracle_tier.description: PRD M1 tiered oracle funnel stage that produced the pass/fail signal.

oracle_spec_sha.description: SHA of the oracle spec in force when this trial was scored (PRD M8-lite).

recipe_spec_sha.description: SHA of the migration recipe spec in force for this trial (PRD M8-lite).

pre_reg_sha.description: SHA of the pre-registered hypotheses_and_thresholds.md file (PRD M8-lite).

score_pre_cutoff.description: PRD M7 contamination-split score for repos created BEFORE the model training cutoff.

score_post_cutoff.description: PRD M7 contamination-split score for repos created AFTER the model training cutoff.
